calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Validity Of Trust And Confirming Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Oct-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew Schultz for and with Tami Wasson (Trustee)
Tonika Dominguez in propria persona

The Court set forth the question of whether there has been sufficient diligence in service, and inquired if Ms. Dominguez wants to oppose the petition. Ms. Dominquez stated she is not opposing. Mr. Schultz stated the prior attorney made attempts, his office also made attempts, called potential employers, and that it doesn't seem difficult to serve but it is.

The petition for order confirming validity of trust and asset of trust is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Validity Of Trust And Confirming Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Aug-23-2019 Continued To Oct-01-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Validity Of Trust And Confirming Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Continued To Aug-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Validity Of Trust And Confirming Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Continued To Jul-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Validity Of Trust And Confirming Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Continued To Jun-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laureen Peebles for and with Tami Wasson.
Tonika Dominguez in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that this matter had been continued for Ms. Dominguez and her Brother to file their objections and possibly hire an Attorney, and that no objections have been filed. Ms. Dominguez stated that she is no longer objecting to this petition. The Court raised the issue of diligence in finding heirs. Ms. Peebles stated that this has been a struggle for them, that there is no knowledge of family members and that no one has come forward. The Court informed Ms. Peebles that she needs to do a search for those who died between William and Esther, and stated that there heirs would be entitled to notice. The Petition for Order Confirming Validity of Trust, etc. is continued to June 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Peebles to figure out who needs notice and for Ms. Peebles to get notice to them.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Validity Of Trust And Confirming Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Continued To May-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Tonika Dominguez in Propria Persona.

Ms. Peebles called to inform the Court that there had been an accident on the Bay Bridge and that she was stuck in traffic. The matter was called at the end of the calendar. Ms. Peebles still was not present. Ms. Dominguez stated that she thinks she is opposing this petition, as well as her Brother and that he is also stuck in traffic. The Petition for Order Confirming Validity of Trust and Confirming Assets to Revocable Trust is continued to May 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Dominguez' objections are to be filed, served and courtesy copies are to be provided to the Court no later than May 20, 2019 to allow time for Ms. Peebles to file her reply. The Court recommended that Ms. Dominguez get an Attorney. The Court also informed Ms. Dominguez that trust matters are very technical and that there are significant rules about trust law that apply.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
